caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bowtie and tan suspenders, is recorded in a studio setting. He wears a distinctive grey, spiked hairpiece and black over-ear headphones. He is seated behind a professional microphone, and the background features a wall decorated with several framed photographs and clothing racks. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and text on the right that reads "BOSS TALK 101". As the sequence progresses, the man speaks, shifting his facial expression and slightly moving his head. In one instance, his right hand is partially visible as he gestures while talking. The lighting remains consistent throughout the scene, and the camera angle remains a medium shot focused on the man.
